reasoning: The refund request for order #000000707 is denied based on the internal fraud alert found in the order comments. The customer, Patricia Johnson, has a suspicious history of 9 refunds in 35 days (an 82% refund rate) totaling $1588.19, with previous claims of 'item not received' despite tracking confirmation. Per the mandatory protocol and internal staff notes, this claim is flagged as fraudulent and should not be processed. I am denying the request and following the internal directive to escalate this account to Loss Prevention.
